creator: dan@langille.org
text:
I'm finding that the output of pkg audit does not match portaudit on a single machine.  The others are OK.

How-To-Repeat: # portaudit -Fa
auditfile.tbz                                 100% of   91 kB  511 kBps 00m00s
New database installed.
Affected package: php5-5.4.16
Type of problem: PHP5 -- memory corruption in openssl_x509_parse().
Reference: http://portaudit.FreeBSD.org/47b4e713-6513-11e3-868f-0025905a4771.html

1 problem(s) in your installed packages found.

You are advised to update or deinstall the affected package(s) immediately.


# pkg audit -F 
Vulnxml file up-to-date.
0 problem(s) in the installed packages found.
